segments.original_text: Y todo lo que haga falta

segments.text: Right, now they need to process that information
segments.original_text: Claro, ahora tiene que tomar las informaciones

segments.text: To adapt better in the next match
segments.original_text: Para adaptarse mejor en la próxima partida
Creo que eso ya está, eh

full_text: And whatever else is needed. Right, now they need to process that information. That's it. To adapt better in the next match. I think that's wrapped. Wow, look at this!
